title: Shipment Executive
description:
Company Overview:

Rabyte Pte Ltd is a leading distributor of electronic components, specializing in providing innovative solutions to a diverse range of industries, including automotive, consumer electronics, industrial, and telecommunications. HQ in Singapore has a strong presence and a commitment to excellence, we pride ourselves on delivering top-quality products and exceptional service to our clients. Join our team and contribute to our mission of driving technological advancement and growth.

Job  Responsibilities:

Customer Sales and Sample Orders:

  • Process customer orders for India customers.
  • Coordinate with Product Managers (PM) for price approvals, including new customer setups and new part registrations.

Supplier Coordination and Expediting:

  • Follow up with suppliers and work with the India SCM (Supply Chain Management) team to expedite Estimated Delivery Dates (EDD).

Special Documentation and Labelling:

  • Prepare and coordinate special labelling and documentation based on key customer delivery requirements.

Supplier Negotiations:

  • Negotiate delivery terms and schedules with suppliers to ensure timely and cost-effective deliveries.

Requirements

Education:

  • Diploma

Experience:

  • Minimum of 3 years of experience in a similar field.

Skills:

  • Communication Effective verbal and written communication skills.
  • Computer Literacy: Proficiency in basic computer applications and inventory management software. (MS Excel / SAP / WMS)
  • Attention to Detail: Keen eye for accuracy and thoroughness.
  • Teamwork: Ability to collaborate effectively with team members.

Personal Attributes:

  • Strong organizational and time-management skills.
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Compensation and Benefits:

  • Competitive Salary: Attractive remuneration based on experience and qualifications.
  • Comprehensive Benefits Package: Includes medical insurance and other benefits.
  • Career Growth: Opportunities for professional development and advancement.

How to Apply:

Interested candidates should submit their resume and a cover letter detailing their qualifications and experience to sky.lin.uw@rabyte.com.

Equal Opportunity Employer:

Rabyte Pte Ltd is an equal-opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
